name: Research Ohio State Fisher MBA program requirements
notes: Check GMAT/GRE requirements, tuition, cohort size, part-time vs. full-time options. Note: Fisher offers online MBA which works for hybrid schedule.

name: Research Case Western Weatherhead MBA options
notes: Weekend MBA format possibly compatible with Columbus commute on alternate Saturdays. Check if employer tuition reimbursement applies.

name: Research Indiana Kelley Direct Online MBA
notes: Fully online format is attractive. Compare cost vs. Fisher. Known strong marketing specialization.

name: Attend Fisher MBA information session (virtual)
notes: Register on Fisher admissions website. Ask about GMAT waiver criteria and marketing analytics concentration.

name: Request Crestline tuition reimbursement policy from HR
notes: HR confirmed $3,000/year reimbursement, requires B or better and approved program list. Fisher and Kelley are on the approved list.

name: Decide: GRE vs. GMAT (or waiver route)
notes: Fisher GMAT waiver requires 3.0+ undergrad GPA (have 3.4) and 2+ years relevant work experience (have 5). Likely to qualify. Still need to confirm Kelley waiver path.

name: Register for GRE prep course (if needed)
notes: Hold off until GMAT waiver decision. If needed look at Magoosh or Princeton Review online options.

name: Request undergraduate transcripts from Cleveland State
notes: Order official transcripts from CSU registrar. Allow 2-3 weeks processing time. Need for all three target schools.

name: Draft personal statement - first version
notes: Focus on: marketing analytics trajectory, Crestline experience, goal of analytics leadership role or brand strategy director. Keep under 750 words initially.

name: Ask Tom Hadley to be professional reference
notes: Ask in person at 1:1 meeting November 10. Give advance notice before Nov 10 to give him time to consider. Tom has been direct supervisor for 2 years.

name: Complete Fisher online MBA application
notes: Round 1 deadline typically Nov/Dec. Confirm exact date on admissions site. Gather resume, personal statement, references, transcripts.

name: Complete Kelley Direct online application
notes: Kelley rolling admissions - submit by Dec 1 for spring cohort consideration. Reuse personal statement with minor edits.

name: Review current lease renewal terms at 485 Sunbury Rd
notes: Current unit: 485 Sunbury Road Unit 2C, Westerville OH 43081. Rent $1,285/mo. Lease ends March 2027. Renewal offer expected Oct-Nov 2026. Check for rate increase.

name: Research Westerville apartments in $1,300-$1,400 range
notes: Check Apartments.com, Zillow. Priorities: in-unit laundry, pet-friendly optional, close to Alum Creek trail for morning runs. 1BR or large studio.

name: Tour option: Sunbury Commons Apt complex (Westerville)
notes: Saw listing on Apartments.com. 1BR at $1,330/mo. Schedule tour for Oct. In-unit laundry listed.

name: Tour option: Polaris area complex (Columbus)
notes: Closer to Crestline office but more expensive area. Check 1BR around Polaris Pkwy area. May be worth the commute trade-off.

name: Make stay vs. move decision (deadline: Dec 1 to give 90 days notice)
notes: If renewal offer is under $1,350 and no issues with current unit, lean toward staying. Must decide by Dec 1 to give 90-day notice if leaving.

name: Pull competitor benchmark data from Salesforce/HubSpot reports
notes: Pull Q1-Q2 2026 data from client's CRM exports. Coordinate with Marcus Webb on access credentials.

name: Collect industry benchmark data from third-party sources
notes: Check Gartner Digital Marketing Benchmarks 2026, HubSpot State of Marketing report. Download and cross-reference with client data.

name: Build benchmark comparison model in Excel
notes: KPIs to benchmark: CTR, conversion rate, CAC, email open rate, ROAS. Build client vs. industry peer comparison tabs.

name: Review analysis with Priya - QA pass
notes: Ask Priya Chatterjee to do a logic check on formulas and segmentation. Set up Tuesday lunch review.

name: Draft Q4 benchmarking executive summary
notes: 2-page max client-facing summary. Highlight top 3 gaps and 3 recommendations. Tom reviews before client submission.

name: Build slide deck for Q4 benchmarking presentation
notes: Use Crestline slide template. ~15 slides. Visualize benchmark gap charts clearly. Include appendix with raw data table.

name: Tom Hadley 1:1 review - Nov 10
notes: Present full draft to Tom at Tuesday 1:1. Incorporate his edits within 3 days. Final review with client Nov 17 before Nov 20 delivery.

name: Submit final Q4 benchmarking report to client (DEADLINE)
notes: Hard client deadline November 20, 2026 (Friday). Deliver PDF report and slide deck via email and shared drive. Copy Tom Hadley and Marcus Webb.
